narrative:
West Chester Twp 13 (precinct in Butler County) has 1,204 registered voters, with 52.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 30.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 16.4%, a pronounced Republican lean of 14.5 percentage points.
